info.name: Vebgenix API
info.description:
Complete Vebgenix backend Postman collection.

Import `Vebgenix-Dev.postman_environment.json`, set `base_url`, `tenant_id`, Cognito values, and run Auth -> Get Token before protected APIs.

Detailed testing guide is in `postman/README.md`.

item.name: 🔐 Auth (Cognito)
item.description: Cognito authentication requests. Run Get Token first, then copy or auto-store access_token, id_token, and refresh_token in the Postman environment.

request.description:
Gets or refreshes Cognito tokens for Postman testing.

Method: POST
URL: https://cognito-idp.{{cognito_region}}.amazonaws.com/
Auth: Cognito service request
Environment variables: {{cognito_client_id}}, {{cognito_region}}, {{refresh_token}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "Token": "{{refresh_token}}",
  "ClientId": "{{cognito_client_id}}"
}
```

GET request for 🔐 Auth (Cognito).

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/me
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.name: 👤 Identity — Users & Staff

request.description:
Returns a list of users.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/users
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new user record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/users
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "fullName": "John Doe",
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "personaRole": "STAFF",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}"
}
```

Returns one user by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/users/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Updates an existing user record.

Method: PATCH
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/users/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "fullName": "Jane Doe",
  "isActive": true
}
```

Deletes or deactivates the selected 👤 identity — users & staff record.

Method: DELETE
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/users/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns a list of staff.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/staff
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

POST request for 👤 Identity — Users & Staff.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/staff
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "email": "teacher@example.com",
  "fullName": "Mr. Smith",
  "phone": "9876543211",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "staffType": "TEACHER",
  "staffCategory": "TEACHING"
}
```

item.description: Tenant user, profile, staff invitation, role, permission, and access-control APIs. These requests require a Cognito access token and tenant context.

item.name: 📋 Admissions
Enquiries

request.description:
Returns a list of enquiries.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/enquiries
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new enquiry record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/enquiries
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "studentName": "Alice Johnson",
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "email": "alice@example.com",
  "source": "Website",
  "notes": "Interested in Grade 9"
}
```

Returns one enquiry by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/enquiries/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Updates an existing enquiry record.

Method: PATCH
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/enquiries/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "status": "CONTACTED",
  "notes": "Called, scheduled visit"
}
```

POST request for 📋 Admissions / Enquiries.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/duplicate-check
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "email": "alice@example.com"
}
```

item.description: Admission enquiry and application lifecycle APIs. Approval only marks an application approved; enrollment/student account creation is handled separately.

item.name: Applications

request.description:
Returns a list of applications.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/applications
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new application record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/applications
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "studentName": "Alice Johnson",
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "email": "alice@example.com",
  "dateOfBirth": "2010-06-15",
  "gender": "FEMALE",
  "guardianName": "Bob Johnson",
  "guardianPhone": "9876543299",
  "guardianRelation": "FATHER"
}
```

Returns one application by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/applications/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

POST request for 📋 Admissions / Applications.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/applications/:id/review
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "decision": "APPROVED",
  "remarks": "All documents verified"
}
```

Approves the selected workflow record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/applications/:id/approve
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "classId": "",
  "sectionId": "",
  "academicYearId": ""
}
```

POST request for 📋 Admissions / Applications.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admissions/applications/:id/withdraw
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.description: Admission enquiry and application lifecycle APIs. Approval only marks an application approved; enrollment/student account creation is handled separately.
Admission enquiry and application lifecycle APIs. Approval only marks an application approved; enrollment/student account creation is handled separately.

item.name: 💰 Finance
Fee Categories

request.description:
Returns a list of fee categories.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-categories?activeOnly=true
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: activeOnly
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one fee category by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-categories/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new fee category record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-categories
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "name": "General Fee",
  "feeType": "GENERAL",
  "moduleType": "FEE",
  "invoicePrefix": "GEN/INV",
  "receiptPrefix": "GEN/REC",
  "defaultAllocationMethod": "PRO_RATA"
}
```

exec: const r = pm.response.json(); if (r.id) pm.environment.set('fee_category_id', r.id);

request.description:
Updates an existing fee category record.

Method: PATCH
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-categories/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "defaultAllocationMethod": "PRIORITY_WISE"
}
```

Deletes or deactivates the selected fee categories record.

Method: DELETE
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-categories/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.description: Finance setup and collection APIs following FeeCategory -> FeeHead -> FeeSchedule -> FeeStructure -> FeeAssignment -> Invoice -> Payment -> PaymentAllocation -> Receipt.

item.name: Fee Heads

request.description:
Returns a list of fee heads.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-heads?feeCategoryId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: feeCategoryId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new fee head record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-heads
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "name": "Tuition Fee",
  "type": "RECURRING",
  "feeCategoryId": "",
  "code": "TUI",
  "isRefundable": false,
  "isMandatory": true,
  "priorityOrder": 1,
  "description": "Monthly tuition charges"
}
```

Updates an existing fee head record.

Method: PATCH
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-heads/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "priorityOrder": 2,
  "isRefundable": true
}
```

Deletes or deactivates the selected fee heads record.

Method: DELETE
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-heads/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.description: Finance setup and collection APIs following FeeCategory -> FeeHead -> FeeSchedule -> FeeStructure -> FeeAssignment -> Invoice -> Payment -> PaymentAllocation -> Receipt.

item.name: Fee Schedules

request.description:
Returns a list of fee schedules.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-schedules?academicYearId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: academicYearId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new fee schedule record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-schedules
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "name": "Quarterly Schedule 25-26",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "feeCategoryId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "collectionType": "PARTIAL_ALLOWED",
  "allowPartialPayment": true,
  "minimumAmount": 0,
  "minimumPercentage": 0,
  "graceDays": 5,
  "lateFeeEnabled": false,
  "notificationEnabled": true,
  "slots": [
    { "name": "Q1", "dueDate": "2025-07-15", "percentOfTotal": 25 },
    { "name": "Q2", "dueDate": "2025-10-15", "percentOfTotal": 25 },
    { "name": "Q3", "dueDate": "2026-01-15", "percentOfTotal": 25 },
    { "name": "Q4", "dueDate": "2026-04-15", "percentOfTotal": 25 }
  ]
}
```

Updates an existing fee schedule record.

Method: PATCH
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-schedules/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "graceDays": 10,
  "lateFeeEnabled": true
}
```

POST request for 💰 Finance / Fee Schedules.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-schedules/:id/slots
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "name": "Supplementary",
  "dueDate": "2026-03-01",
  "fixedAmount": 5000
}
```

Deletes or deactivates the selected fee schedules record.

Method: DELETE
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-schedules/:id/slots/:slotIndex
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id, slotIndex
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Deletes or deactivates the selected fee schedules record.

Method: DELETE
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-schedules/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.description: Finance setup and collection APIs following FeeCategory -> FeeHead -> FeeSchedule -> FeeStructure -> FeeAssignment -> Invoice -> Payment -> PaymentAllocation -> Receipt.

item.name: Fee Structures

request.description:
Returns a list of fee structures.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-structures?academicYearId=&feeCategoryId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: academicYearId, feeCategoryId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one fee structure by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-structures/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Grade 10 Annual Fee 25-26",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "classId": "",
  "feeCategoryId": "",
  "feeScheduleId": "",
  "allocationMethod": "PRO_RATA",
  "components": [
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Tuition Fee", "amount": 50000, "isOptional": false, "priorityOrder": 1 },
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Lab Fee",     "amount": 5000,  "isOptional": false, "priorityOrder": 2 },
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Sports Fee",  "amount": 2000,  "isOptional": true,  "priorityOrder": 3 }
  ]
}

request.description:
Creates a new fee structure record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-structures
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "name": "Grade 10 Annual Fee 25-26",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "classId": "",
  "feeCategoryId": "",
  "feeScheduleId": "",
  "allocationMethod": "PRO_RATA",
  "components": [
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Tuition Fee", "amount": 50000, "isOptional": false, "priorityOrder": 1 },
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Lab Fee",     "amount": 5000,  "isOptional": false, "priorityOrder": 2 },
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Sports Fee",  "amount": 2000,  "isOptional": true,  "priorityOrder": 3 }
  ]
}
```

Updates an existing fee structure record.

Method: PATCH
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-structures/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "allocationMethod": "PRIORITY_WISE"
}
```

Deletes or deactivates the selected fee structures record.

Method: DELETE
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-structures/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.name: Copy Fee Pattern to Next Year

request.description:
POST request for 💰 Finance / Fee Structures.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-pattern/copy
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "fromAcademicYearId": "",
  "toAcademicYearId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "fromGradeId": "",
  "toGradeId": "",
  "feeCategoryId": "",
  "activateCopies": false
}
```

item.description: Finance setup and collection APIs following FeeCategory -> FeeHead -> FeeSchedule -> FeeStructure -> FeeAssignment -> Invoice -> Payment -> PaymentAllocation -> Receipt.

item.name: Fee Assignments

request.description:
Returns a list of fee assignments.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-assignments?studentId=&academicYearId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: studentId, academicYearId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one fee assignment by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-assignments/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one student fee assignment by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/students/:studentId/fee-assignment?academicYearId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: studentId
Query parameters: academicYearId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

POST request for 💰 Finance / Fee Assignments.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-assignments
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "studentId": "",
  "feeStructureId": "",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "discountAmount": 0,
  "discountReason": ""
}
```

POST request for 💰 Finance / Fee Assignments.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-assignments/bulk
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "feeStructureId": "",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "classId": "",
  "discountAmount": 0
}
```

GET request for 💰 Finance / Fee Assignments.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/fee-assignment-queue?academicYearId=&classId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: academicYearId, classId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

GET request for 💰 Finance / Fee Assignments.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/assignable-fee-structures?academicYearId=&classId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: academicYearId, classId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.description: Finance setup and collection APIs following FeeCategory -> FeeHead -> FeeSchedule -> FeeStructure -> FeeAssignment -> Invoice -> Payment -> PaymentAllocation -> Receipt.

item.name: Invoices

request.description:
Returns a list of invoices.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/invoices?studentId=&status=PENDING
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: studentId, status
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one invoice by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/invoices/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new one-off charge record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/invoices
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "studentId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "feeCategoryId": "",
  "dueDate": "2026-06-30",
  "collectionType": "FULL_ONLY",
  "allocationMethod": "PRO_RATA",
  "items": [
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Re-admission Fee", "amount": 2000, "concession": 0, "priorityOrder": 1 }
  ]
}
```

GET request for 💰 Finance / Invoices.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/students/:studentId/dues
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: studentId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.description: Finance setup and collection APIs following FeeCategory -> FeeHead -> FeeSchedule -> FeeStructure -> FeeAssignment -> Invoice -> Payment -> PaymentAllocation -> Receipt.

item.name: Payments

request.description:
Handles payment, allocation, receipt, or payment gateway workflow.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/payments
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "invoiceId": "",
  "studentId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "amount": 10000,
  "method": "CASH",
  "remarks": "Partial payment"
}
```

Handles payment, allocation, receipt, or payment gateway workflow.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/payments
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "invoiceId": "",
  "studentId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "amount": 10000,
  "method": "CHEQUE",
  "allocations": [
    { "invoiceItemId": "", "allocatedAmount": 8000 },
    { "invoiceItemId": "", "allocatedAmount": 2000 }
  ]
}
```

POST request for 💰 Finance / Payments.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/students/:studentId/collect
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: studentId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "amount": 50000,
  "method": "ONLINE",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "academicYearId": ""
}
```

Creates a new razorpay order record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/finance/payments/create-order
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "invoiceId": "",
  "studentId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "amount": 50000,
  "currency": "INR"
}
```

exec: const r = pm.response.json(); if (r.razorpayOrderId) pm.environment.set('razorpay_order_id', r.razorpayOrderId);

request.description:
POST request for 💰 Finance / Payments.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/finance/payments/verify
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{razorpay_order_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "razorpay_order_id": "{{razorpay_order_id}}",
  "razorpay_payment_id": "",
  "razorpay_signature": ""
}
```

Returns a list of payments.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/payments?invoiceId=&status=SUCCESS
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: invoiceId, status
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one payment by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/payments/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns a list of receipts.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/receipts?studentId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: studentId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one receipt by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/receipts/:id
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

item.description: Finance setup and collection APIs following FeeCategory -> FeeHead -> FeeSchedule -> FeeStructure -> FeeAssignment -> Invoice -> Payment -> PaymentAllocation -> Receipt.

item.name: Payment Allocations

request.description:
Returns a list of allocations by payment.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/payments/:paymentId/allocations
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: paymentId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns a list of allocations by invoice.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/finance/invoices/:invoiceId/allocations
Auth: Bearer token required

Creates a new academic year record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/tenants/:tenantId/academic-years
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: tenantId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "name": "25-26",
  "startDate": "2025-06-01",
  "endDate": "2026-05-31",
  "isCurrent": true
}
```

POST request for ⚙️ Settings.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/tenants/:tenantId/academic-years/:id/activate
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id, tenantId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one tenant features by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/features
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Updates an existing tenant features record.

Method: PATCH
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/features
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "onlinePayments": true,
  "certificates": true,
  "studentPortal": true
}
```

Returns a list of templates.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/templates
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new template record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/templates
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "name": "Bonafide Certificate",
  "type": "CERTIFICATE"
}
```

POST request for ⚙️ Settings. Method: POST URL: {{base_url}}/api/templates/:id/publish Auth: Bearer token required Path parameters: id Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{studentName}}, {{tenant_id}} Example body: ```json { "content": "

This is to certify that {{studentName}} is a bonafide student.

", "variables": ["studentName", "admissionNo", "class", "academicYear"] } ```

GET request for ⚙️ Settings.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/dashboard
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

GET request for ⚙️ Settings.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/platform/overview
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}

item.description: Tenant, campus, academic year, feature flag, template, branding, and platform settings APIs.

item.name: 📢 Comms

request.description:
Returns a list of announcements.

Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new announcement record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/announcements
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "title": "Holiday Notice",
  "body": "College will remain closed on 15th Aug",
  "targetGroup": "ALL",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}"
}
```

POST request for 📢 Comms.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/announcements/:id/publish
Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns a list of events.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/events
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Creates a new event record.

Method: POST
URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/events
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "title": "Annual Day",
  "date": "2026-12-15",
  "description": "Annual cultural event",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}"
}
```

Returns a list of leave requests.

URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/leave
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

URL: {{base_url}}/api/admin/leave
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

  "type": "CASUAL",

Approves the selected workflow record.

Method: POST

Auth: Bearer token required
Path parameters: id
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

request.description:
Returns one section timetable by id or filter.

Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: classId, sectionId, academicYearId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

Returns one teacher timetable by id or filter.

Method: GET
URL: {{base_url}}/api/timetable/teacher?teacherId=&academicYearId=
Auth: Bearer token required
Query parameters: teacherId, academicYearId
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{tenant_id}}

PUT request for 🗓 Timetable.

Method: PUT
URL: {{base_url}}/api/timetable
Auth: Bearer token required
Environment variables: {{access_token}}, {{base_url}}, {{campus_id}}, {{tenant_id}}

Example body:
```json
{
  "classId": "",
  "sectionId": "",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "slots": [
    { "day": "MON", "period": 1, "subjectId": "", "subjectName": "Mathematics", "teacherId": "", "teacherName": "Mr. Sharma", "startTime": "09:00", "endTime": "09:45" }
  ]
}
```
